    About EDYC

    East Down Yacht Club ( EDYC ) has extensive facilities for both cruising and racing. It is located on the western shores of Strangford Lough, Co Down, Northern Ireland.

    Learn more about EDYC

    Join EDYC

    East Down Yacht Club welcomes membership applications from both beginners and those who are more experienced who have an interest in sailing on Strangford Lough.

    Join Now

    Contact
